description: Community-contributed TokenCalibrator snapshots for various LLMs. Each entry contains the learned accumulator state (a, g, strength) that a calibrator can start from instead of bare priors.

default.description: Ridge prior only — equivalent to a fresh TokenCalibrator(). Useful as a fallback or starting point for models not yet calibrated.

gpt-4o.description: Placeholder — no real observations yet. Contribute your learned snapshot!

claude-3.5-sonnet.description: Placeholder — no real observations yet. Contribute your learned snapshot!

gemini-2.0-flash.description: Placeholder — no real observations yet. Contribute your learned snapshot!
